title: Sericanthe chevalieri
taxonomy: Sericanthe chevalieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Sericanthe, which is part of the family Rubiaceae. The genus Sericanthe is a part of the Rubiaceae family, a large and diverse family of flowering plants. The classification of Sericanthe chevalieri places it within the order Gentianales. The species is closely related to other plants in the family Rubiaceae, which is native to tropical regions.
